description: Antiviral drug that reduces severity and duration of flu symptoms.
warnings: May cause nausea; take with food.

description: NSAID for relieving fever, body ache, and inflammation.
warnings: Avoid on empty stomach; not for kidney patients.

description: Analgesic for fever and mild pain relief.
warnings: Do not exceed 4g/day; avoid alcohol.

description: Antihistamine to reduce runny nose and sneezing.
warnings: May cause drowsiness.

description: Nasal decongestant for congestion relief.
warnings: Avoid if hypertensive; may cause insomnia.

description: Cough suppressant for dry cough.
warnings: Do not use with MAO inhibitors.

description: Antiviral protease inhibitor for high-risk COVID-19 patients.
dosage: 300mg nirmatrelvir + 100mg ritonavir twice daily for 5 days
warnings: Multiple drug interactions; consult physician.

description: Corticosteroid that reduces inflammation in severe COVID-19.
dosage: 6mg once daily for up to 10 days
warnings: For hospitalised patients on oxygen only.

description: IV antiviral for hospitalised COVID-19 patients.
dosage: 200mg IV on day 1, then 100mg IV daily for 4 days
warnings: Monitor liver enzymes; hospital use only.

description: First-line antibiotic for community-acquired pneumonia.
warnings: Check for penicillin allergy.

description: Macrolide antibiotic effective against atypical pneumonia.
dosage: 500mg on day 1, then 250mg daily for 4 days
warnings: QT prolongation risk; monitor cardiac patients.

description: Fluoroquinolone for resistant pneumonia cases.
warnings: Avoid in children; tendon rupture risk.

description: First-line oral antidiabetic to lower blood glucose.
warnings: Avoid in renal impairment; may cause GI upset.

description: Sulfonylurea that stimulates insulin secretion.
warnings: Risk of hypoglycaemia; monitor blood sugar.

description: SGLT2 inhibitor with cardiovascular protective effects.
warnings: Risk of UTI and genital infections.

description: Calcium channel blocker for lowering blood pressure.
warnings: May cause ankle swelling and flushing.

description: ACE inhibitor for hypertension and heart failure.
warnings: Can cause dry cough; avoid in pregnancy.

description: ARB for hypertension; renal-protective in diabetics.
warnings: Monitor potassium levels; avoid in pregnancy.

description: Triptan for acute migraine attack relief.
warnings: Do not use in cardiovascular disease.

description: NSAID for mild-to-moderate migraine pain.
warnings: GI irritation; avoid in renal disease.

description: Anticonvulsant used for migraine prophylaxis.
warnings: Cognitive side effects; kidney stone risk.

description: PPI to reduce stomach acid and promote healing.
warnings: Long-term use may affect bone density.

description: H2 blocker to reduce acid production.
warnings: Dose adjustment in renal impairment.

description: Quick symptomatic relief from heartburn and indigestion.
warnings: Avoid overuse; may cause diarrhoea.

description: Fluoroquinolone antibiotic for Salmonella typhi.
warnings: Avoid in children; tendon risk.

description: Effective against fluoroquinolone-resistant typhoid.
warnings: GI side effects.

description: IV cephalosporin for severe or complicated typhoid.
warnings: Hospital administration; allergy check.

description: First-line ACT for uncomplicated P. falciparum malaria.
warnings: Take with fatty food; avoid grapefruit.

description: For P. vivax and P. malariae in sensitive regions.
dosage: 600mg initially, then 300mg after 6h, then 150mg for 2 days
warnings: Resistance common; G6PD check.

description: Prevents relapse in P. vivax and P. ovale infections.
warnings: Contraindicated in G6PD deficiency and pregnancy.

description: Fever and pain management in dengue fever.
warnings: Avoid NSAIDs due to bleeding risk.

description: Fluid replacement to manage dengue haemorrhagic fever.
warnings: Hospital monitoring required.

description: For severe thrombocytopenia (<20,000 platelets/µL).
warnings: Risk of transfusion reactions.

description: Standard 6-month first-line TB treatment regimen.
warnings: Hepatotoxicity; monthly LFT monitoring.

description: Core bactericidal drug in TB regimen.
warnings: Peripheral neuropathy; give pyridoxine supplement.

description: Sterilising drug used in intensive phase of TB treatment.
warnings: Hyperuricaemia; avoid in liver disease.

description: Oral iron supplementation for iron-deficiency anaemia.
warnings: GI upset; constipation common. Take with Vit C.

description: For folate-deficiency anaemia and megaloblastic anaemia.
warnings: Rule out B12 deficiency first.

description: For B12-deficiency and pernicious anaemia.
warnings: Hypokalaemia after initiation in severe cases.

description: Short-acting bronchodilator for acute asthma relief.
warnings: Overuse may mask worsening disease.

description: Inhaled corticosteroid for long-term asthma control.
warnings: Rinse mouth after use to prevent thrush.

description: Leukotriene receptor antagonist for maintenance therapy.
warnings: Neuropsychiatric effects in some patients.

description: First-line antibiotic for uncomplicated UTI.
warnings: Not for upper UTI or renal impairment.

description: Antibiotic for UTI where sensitivity is confirmed.
warnings: Folate antagonist; avoid in pregnancy.

description: Used for complicated UTI or pyelonephritis.
warnings: Reserve for resistant cases.

description: NSAID for pain and inflammation in arthritis.
warnings: GI bleeding risk; avoid with anticoagulants.

description: DMARD for rheumatoid arthritis disease modification.
warnings: Hepatotoxic; regular blood monitoring required.

description: Antimalarial DMARD for mild-to-moderate RA.
warnings: Annual ophthalmology check for retinopathy.

description: SSRI antidepressant — first-line for major depression.
warnings: Suicidal ideation risk initially; monitor closely.

description: SSRI with good tolerability for depression and anxiety.
warnings: QT prolongation at high doses.

description: SNRI for depression with anxious features.
warnings: Discontinuation syndrome; taper slowly.

description: First-line SSRI for generalised anxiety disorder.
warnings: Takes 2–4 weeks for full effect.

description: Effective SSRI for multiple anxiety disorders.
warnings: Initial anxiety increase possible.

description: Non-benzodiazepine anxiolytic for chronic anxiety.
warnings: Not for acute anxiety; 2-week delay in effect.

description: Synthetic thyroid hormone replacement therapy.
warnings: Take 30–60 min before breakfast; many drug interactions.

description: Synthetic T3 used when T4 conversion is impaired.
warnings: Cardiac risk at higher doses; careful titration.

description: Natural thyroid extract containing T3 and T4.
dosage: As prescribed based on TSH levels
warnings: Variable potency; some patients prefer synthetic.

description: Antibiotic for bacterial acute bronchitis exacerbations.
warnings: GI side effects; penicillin allergy check.

description: Bronchodilator to relieve wheeze in bronchitis.
warnings: Tremor and palpitations at high doses.

description: Expectorant to thin and loosen mucus.
warnings: Drink plenty of fluids.
